member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker
member.summary:
PdfA1Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-1 standard and contains method implementations from the abstract
class.
member.remarks:
PdfA1Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-1 standard and contains method implementations from the abstract
class.
The specification implemented by this class is ISO 19005-1

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfAConformance)
member.summary: Creates a PdfA1Checker with the required conformance
member.param: the required conformance, a or b

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.GetMaxRealValue
member.summary: Retrieve maximum allowed real value.
member.returns: maximum allowed real number

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.GetMaxIntegerValue
member.summary: Retrieve maximal allowed integer value.
member.returns: maximal allowed integer number

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.GetMinIntegerValue
member.summary: Retrieve minimal allowed integer value.
member.returns: minimal allowed integer number

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.GetMaxNameLength
member.summary: Retrieve maximum allowed length of the name object.
member.returns: maximum allowed length of the name

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.GetMaxStringLength
member.summary: Returns maximum allowed bytes length of the string in a PDF document.
member.returns: maximum string length

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.GetForbiddenAnnotations
member.summary: Gets forbidden annotation types.
member.returns: a set of forbidden annotation types

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA1Checker.GetFormFields(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfArray)
member.summary:
Gets a
of fields with kids from a
of
objects.
member.returns:
the
of form fields

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker
member.summary: PdfA2Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-2 standard and contains a number of methods that override the implementations of its superclass .
member.remarks:
PdfA2Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-2 standard and contains a number of methods that override the implementations of its superclass .
The specification implemented by this class is ISO 19005-2

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfAConformance)
member.summary: Creates a PdfA2Checker with the required conformance
member.param: the required conformance, a or u or b

member.summary: Checks the number of components in DeviceN color space.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.GetAppearanceLessAnnotations
member.summary: Gets annotation types which are allowed not to have appearance stream.
member.returns: set of annotation names.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.CheckAnnotationAgainstActions(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: Checked annotation against actions, exception will be thrown if either A or AA actions aren't allowed for specific type of annotation.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.CheckCatalogAAConformance(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: Checks if the catalog is compliant with the PDF/A-2 standard.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.CheckPageAAConformance(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: Checks if the page is compliant with the PDF/A-2 standard.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.CheckFormXObject(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream)
member.summary:
For pdf/a-2+ checkers this method is overridden to use
method.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.CheckFormXObject(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream)
member.summary: Verify the conformity of the Form XObject with appropriate specification.
member.remarks: Verify the conformity of the Form XObject with appropriate specification. Throws PdfAConformanceException if any discrepancy was found

member.summary: Verify the conformity of the transparency group XObject with appropriate specification.
member.remarks: Verify the conformity of the transparency group XObject with appropriate specification. Throws PdfAConformanceException if any discrepancy was found

member.summary: Check optional content configuration dictionary against AS key.

member.summary: Retrieve transparency error message valid for the pdf/a standard being used.
member.returns: error message.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA2Checker.CheckBlendMode(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfName)
member.summary: Check if blendMode is compatible with pdf/a standard being used.

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA3Checker
member.summary: PdfA3Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-3 standard and contains a number of methods that override the implementations of its superclass .
member.remarks: PdfA3Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-3 standard and contains a number of methods that override the implementations of its superclass . The specification implemented by this class is ISO 19005-3

member.summary: Creates a PdfA3Checker with the required conformance
member.param: the required conformance, a or u or b

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA4Checker
member.summary: PdfA4Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-4 standard and contains a number of methods that override the implementations of its superclass .
member.remarks:
PdfA4Checker defines the requirements of the PDF/A-4 standard and contains a number of methods that override the implementations of its superclass .
The specification implemented by this class is ISO 19005-4

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA4Checker.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfAConformance)
member.summary: Creates a PdfA4Checker with the required conformance

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA4Checker.CheckCatalogAAConformance(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: Check the conformity of the AA dictionary on catalog level.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA4Checker.CheckPageAAConformance(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: Check the conformity of the AA dictionary on catalog level.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA4Checker.CheckWidgetAAConformance(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: Check the conformity of the AA dictionary on widget level.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfA4Checker.IsValidXmpConformance(System.String)
member.summary: A PDF/A-4e conforming file shall specify the value of pdfa:conformance as E.
member.remarks: A PDF/A-4e conforming file shall specify the value of pdfa:conformance as E. A PDF/A-4f conforming file shall specify the value of pdfa:conformance as F. A file that does not conform to either PDF/A-4e or PDF/A-4f shall not provide any pdfa:conformance.
member.returns:
if pdfa:conformance value is valid,
otherwise

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker
member.summary: An abstract class that will run through all necessary checks defined in the different PDF/A standards and levels.
member.remarks: An abstract class that will run through all necessary checks defined in the different PDF/A standards and levels. A number of common checks are executed in this class, while standard-dependent specifications are implemented in the available subclasses. The standard that is followed is the series of ISO 19005 specifications, currently generations 1 through 3. The ZUGFeRD standard is derived from ISO 19005-3. While it is possible to subclass this method and implement its abstract methods in client code, this is not encouraged and will have little effect. It is not possible to plug custom implementations into iText, because iText should always refuse to create non-compliant PDF/A, which would be possible with client code implementations. Any future generations of the PDF/A standard and its derivates will get their own implementation in the iText - pdfa project.

member.name: F:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.ICC_COLOR_SPACE_RGB
member.summary: The Red-Green-Blue color profile as defined by the International Color Consortium.

member.name: F:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.ICC_COLOR_SPACE_CMYK
member.summary: The Cyan-Magenta-Yellow-Key (black) color profile as defined by the International Color Consortium.

member.name: F:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.ICC_COLOR_SPACE_GRAY
member.summary: The Grayscale color profile as defined by the International Color Consortium.

member.name: F:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.ICC_DEVICE_CLASS_OUTPUT_PROFILE
member.summary: The Output device class

member.name: F:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.ICC_DEVICE_CLASS_MONITOR_PROFILE
member.summary: The Monitor device class

member.name: F:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.maxGsStackDepth
member.summary: The maximum Graphics State stack depth in PDF/A documents, i.e. the maximum number of graphics state operators with code q that may be opened (i.e. not yet closed by a corresponding Q) at any point in a content stream sequence.
member.remarks:
The maximum Graphics State stack depth in PDF/A documents, i.e. the maximum number of graphics state operators with code q that may be opened (i.e. not yet closed by a corresponding Q) at any point in a content stream sequence.
Defined as 28 by PDF/A-1 section 6.1.12, by referring to the PDF spec Appendix C table 1 "architectural limits".

member.name: F:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.checkedObjects
member.summary: Contains some objects that are already checked.
member.remarks:
Contains some objects that are already checked. NOTE: Not all objects that were checked are stored in that set. This set is used for avoiding double checks for actions, signatures, xObjects and page objects; and for letting those objects to be manually flushed.
Use this mechanism carefully: objects that are able to be changed (or at least if object's properties that shall be checked are able to be changed) shouldn't be marked as checked if they are not to be flushed immediately.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfAConformance)
member.summary: Creates a PdfAChecker with the required conformance.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckDocument(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfCatalog)
member.summary: This method checks a number of document-wide requirements of the PDF/A standard.
member.remarks: This method checks a number of document-wide requirements of the PDF/A standard. The algorithms of some of these checks vary with the PDF/A level and thus are implemented in subclasses; others are implemented as private methods in this class.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckSinglePage(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfPage)
member.summary: This method checks all requirements that must be fulfilled by a page in a PDF/A document.
member.param: the page that must be checked

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckPdfObject(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfObject)
member.summary: This method checks the requirements that must be fulfilled by a COS object in a PDF/A document.
member.param: the COS object that must be checked

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.GetAConformance
member.summary:
Gets the
for this file.
member.returns: the defined conformance for this document.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.IsFullCheckMode
member.summary: In full check mode all objects will be tested for ISO conformance.
member.remarks: In full check mode all objects will be tested for ISO conformance. If full check mode is switched off objects which were not modified might be skipped to speed up the validation of the document
member.returns: true if full check mode is switched on

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.SetFullCheckMode(System.Boolean)
member.summary: In full check mode all objects will be tested for ISO conformance.
member.remarks: In full check mode all objects will be tested for ISO conformance. If full check mode is switched off objects which were not modified might be skipped to speed up the validation of the document
member.param: is a new value for full check mode switcher

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckTagStructureElement(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfObject)
member.summary: This method checks compliance of the tag structure elements, such as struct elements or parent tree entries.
member.param: an object that represents tag structure element.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckSignature(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: This method checks compliance of the signature dictionary

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckSignatureType(System.Boolean)
member.summary: This method checks compliance of the signature type.
member.param:
if CAdES signature type is used,
otherwise

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckCanvasStack(System.Char)
member.summary: This method checks compliance with the graphics state architectural limitation, explained by .
member.param: the operation to check the graphics state counter for

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckInlineImage(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: This method checks compliance with the inline image restrictions in the PDF/A specs, specifically filter parameters.
member.param:
a
containing the color spaces used in the document

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckColor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.Canvas.CanvasGraphicsState,iText.Kernel.Colors.Color,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream)
member.summary: This method checks compliance with the color restrictions imposed by the available color spaces in the document.
member.param:
a
containing the color spaces used in the document
whether the color is used for fill or stroke operations

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckColorSpace(iText.Kernel.Pdf.Colorspace.PdfColorSpace,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfObject,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: This method performs a range of checks on the given color space, depending on the type and properties of that color space.
member.param: the pdf object to check color space in

a
containing the color spaces used in the document
whether or not to also check the parent color space
whether the color space is used for fill or stroke operations

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.SetPdfAOutputIntentColorSpace(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDictionary)
member.summary: Set Pdf A output intent color space.
member.param: Catalog dictionary to retrieve the color space from.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckRenderingIntent(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfName)
member.summary: Checks whether the rendering intent of the document is within the allowed range of intents.
member.remarks: Checks whether the rendering intent of the document is within the allowed range of intents. This is defined in ISO 19005-1 section 6.2.9, and unchanged in newer generations of the PDF/A specification.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckFontGlyphs(iText.Kernel.Font.PdfFont,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream)
member.summary: Performs a check of the each font glyph as a Form XObject.
member.remarks: Performs a check of the each font glyph as a Form XObject. See ISO 19005-2 Annex A.5. This only applies to type 3 fonts. This method will be abstract in update 7.2

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckExtGState(iText.Kernel.Pdf.Canvas.CanvasGraphicsState,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream)
member.summary: Performs a number of checks on the graphics state, among others ISO 19005-1 section 6.2.8 and 6.4 and ISO 19005-2 section 6.2.5 and 6.2.10.
member.remarks: Performs a number of checks on the graphics state, among others ISO 19005-1 section 6.2.8 and 6.4 and ISO 19005-2 section 6.2.5 and 6.2.10. This method will be abstract in the update 7.2
member.param: the graphics state to be checked

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckFont(iText.Kernel.Font.PdfFont)
member.summary: Performs a number of checks on the font.
member.remarks: Performs a number of checks on the font. See ISO 19005-1 section 6.3, ISO 19005-2 and ISO 19005-3 section 6.2.11. Be aware that not all constraints defined in the ISO are checked in this method, for most of them we consider that iText always creates valid fonts.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckXrefTable(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfXrefTable)
member.summary: Verify the conformity of the cross-reference table.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckCrypto(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfObject)
member.summary: Verify the conformity of encryption usage.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckText(System.String,iText.Kernel.Font.PdfFont)
member.summary: Verify the conformity of the text written by the specified font.
member.param: font to verify the text against

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.Checker.PdfAChecker.CheckContentStream(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfStream)
member.summary: Attest content stream conformance with appropriate specification.
member.remarks: Attest content stream conformance with appropriate specification. Throws PdfAConformanceException if any discrepancy was found
member.param: is a content stream to validate

member.param: is an operand of content stream to validate

member.summary: Exception that is thrown when the PDF Document doesn't adhere to the PDF/A specification.

member.summary: Creates a PdfAConformanceException.

member.summary: Class that bundles all the error message templates as constants.

member.summary: Class containing pdfa conformance constants to be used in logging.

member.summary: Class containing constants to be used in logging.

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.PdfADefaultFontStrategy
member.summary: The class presents default font strategy for PDF/A documents which doesn't provide default font because all used fonts must be embedded.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.PdfADefaultFontStrategy.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDocument)
member.summary:
Instantiates a new
instance based on the document which will use that strategy.
member.param: the pdf document which will use that strategy

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocument
member.summary:
This class extends
and is in charge of creating files that comply with the PDF/A standard.
member.remarks:
This class extends
and is in charge of creating files that comply with the PDF/A standard.
Client code is still responsible for making sure the file is actually PDF/A compliant: multiple steps must be undertaken (depending on the
) to ensure that the PDF/A standard is followed.
This class will throw exceptions, mostly
, and thus refuse to output a PDF/A file if at any point the document does not adhere to the PDF/A guidelines specified by the .

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocument.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfWriter,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfAConformance,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfOutputIntent)
member.summary: Constructs a new PdfADocument for writing purposes, i.e. from scratch.
member.remarks: Constructs a new PdfADocument for writing purposes, i.e. from scratch. A PDF/A file has a conformance, and must have an explicit output intent.
member.param: the generation and strictness level of the PDF/A that must be followed.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocument.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfWriter,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfAConformance,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfOutputIntent,iText.Kernel.Pdf.DocumentProperties)
member.summary: Constructs a new PdfADocument for writing purposes, i.e. from scratch.
member.remarks: Constructs a new PdfADocument for writing purposes, i.e. from scratch. A PDF/A file has a conformance, and must have an explicit output intent.
member.param: the generation and strictness level of the PDF/A that must be followed.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocument.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfReader,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfWriter)
member.summary: Opens a PDF/A document in the stamping mode.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocument.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfReader,iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfWriter,iText.Kernel.Pdf.StampingProperties)
member.summary: Opens a PDF/A document in stamping mode.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocument.GetCorrectCheckerFromConformance(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfAConformance)
member.summary:
Gets correct
for specified PDF/A conformance.
member.param: the conformance for which checker is needed
member.returns: the correct PDF/A checker

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocumentInfoHelper
member.summary: The class is helper which used for PDF/A document to properly configure PDF document's info dictionary.

member.name: M:iText.Pdfa.PdfADocumentInfoHelper.#ctor(iText.Kernel.Pdf.PdfDocument)
member.summary:
Instantiates a new
instance based on the document.
member.param: the pdf document which will use that helper

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.PdfAPageFactory
member.summary: The class implements PDF page factory which is used for creating correct PDF/A documents.

member.summary:
Instantiates a new
instance based on .

member.name: T:iText.Pdfa.PdfAXMPUtil
member.summary: Utilities to construct an XMP for a PDF/A file.
